1.  [H]{.text-T4}[A]{.text-T5}[:

        ]{.text-T9}[W=]{.text-T10}[{]{.text-T11}[F; F ≥
    F]{.text-T10}[1-]{.text-T12}[α]{.text-T13}[(n-1;m-1)]{.text-T10}[}]{.text-T11}[
    ]{.text-T10}[        ]{.text-T4}[        ]{.text-T4}

    [H]{.text-T4}[A]{.text-T5}[:
    ]{.text-T4}[σ]{.text-T6}[2]{.text-T7}[1]{.text-T8}[ \<
    ]{.text-T9}[σ]{.text-T6}[2]{.text-T7}[2]{.text-T8}[ ]{.text-T9}[   
        ]{.text-T8}[W=]{.text-T10}[{]{.text-T11}[F; F ≤
    F]{.text-T10}[α]{.text-T13}[(n-1;m-1)]{.text-T10}[}]{.text-T11}[
    ]{.text-T10}

    [H]{.text-T4}[A]{.text-T5}[:
    ]{.text-T4}[σ]{.text-T6}[2]{.text-T7}[1]{.text-T8}[ ≠
    ]{.text-T9}[σ]{.text-T6}[2]{.text-T7}[2]{.text-T8}[ ]{.text-T9}[   
        ]{.text-T8}[W=]{.text-T10}[{]{.text-T11}[F;
    ]{.text-T10}[F]{.text-T4}[ ≤
    F]{.text-T10}[α]{.text-T13}[/2]{.text-T8}[(n-1;m-1)]{.text-T10}

    [        ]{.text-T14}[        ]{.text-T14}[U]{.text-T14}[
    ]{.text-T10}[F]{.text-T4}[ ≥
    F]{.text-T10}[1-]{.text-T12}[α]{.text-T13}[/2]{.text-T8}[(n-1;m-1)]{.text-T10}[}]{.text-T11}[

|     (kg)]{.text-T64}             |     (kg)]{.text-T64}             |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
| 1.  [85]{.text-T65}              | 1.  [76]{.text-T65}              |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
| 1.  [75]{.text-T65}              | 1.  [75]{.text-T65}              |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
| 1.  [90]{.text-T65}              | 1.  [81]{.text-T65}              |

| 1.  [65]{.text-T65}              | 1.  [64]{.text-T65}              |

| 1.  [150]{.text-T65}             | 1.  [155]{.text-T65}             |

+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
| 1.  [56]{.text-T65}              | 1.  [45]{.text-T65}              |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
| 1.  [88]{.text-T65}              | 1.  [89]{.text-T65}              |

| 1.  [73]{.text-T65}              | 1.  [66]{.text-T65}              |

| 1.  [67]{.text-T65}              | 1.  [56]{.text-T65}              |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
| 1.  [134]{.text-T65}             | 1.  [110]{.text-T65}             |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
